# Mhbuilder Lahore

> Building contractor and construction consultant based in DHA Phase 8, Lahore, Pakistan, offering full-cycle construction services for residential, commercial, and institutional buildings.

Mhbuilder Lahore has over 25 years of experience and is open 24 hours. The team handles every stage of a project: design and legal consultancy, site and project management, grey structure, finishing, interiors, and renovation. The service area is Lahore, Pakistan, with a focus on DHA Phase 8 and surrounding sectors.

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +92-301-9492494
- Website: https://mhbuilderlahore.site
- Address: FCQX+XR, Sector T, DHA Phase 8, Lahore, 54000, Pakistan

## Services

- [Residential Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/residential-building.html): Houses and homes built from grey structure to full finish in DHA Phase 8 and across Lahore.
- [Commercial Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/commercial-building.html): Plazas and office buildings with engineer-approved, multi-storey structures.
- [Hospital Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/hospital-building.html): Hospitals and clinics built to infection-control and PHC-compliant standards.
- [Restaurant Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/restaurant-building.html): Commercial kitchens, ventilation, dining interiors, and street-facing facades.
- [Marriage Hall Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/marriage-hall.html): Clear-span event venues with high-capacity electrical systems and grand facades.
- [Shopping Mall Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/shopping-mall.html): Retail buildings with maximised shop frontage and multi-unit layouts.
- [School Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/school-building.html): Educational facilities built to Punjab education standards, including classrooms and labs.
- [Factory & Warehouse Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/factory-warehouse.html): Industrial sheds with clear-span layouts, heavy-duty floors, and loading bays.
- [Mosque Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/mosque-building.html): Prayer halls, minarets, domes, and ablution areas built with traditional craftsmanship.
- [Hotel Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/hotel-building.html): Guest rooms, lobbies, and restaurants built to hospitality standards.
- [Apartment Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/apartment-building.html): Multi-storey residential apartments and flats with consistent unit quality.
- [Farmhouse Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/farmhouse.html): Open-plan farmhouses with large plots, boundary walls, and outdoor living areas.
- [Office Building Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/office-building.html): Corporate workspaces with flexible floor plans and professional facades.
- [Drawing Plans](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/drawing-plan.html): 2D floor plans and 3D architectural designs, including LDA and DHA approval drawings.
- [Grey Structure Construction](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/grey-structure.html): Foundation, columns, beams, and slab work with transparent per-marla pricing.
- [Interior Designing](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/interior-designing.html): Tiling, custom woodwork, paint, false ceilings, and fixtures.
- [Exterior Designing](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/exterior-designing.html): Facade finishing, texture render, boundary walls, and outdoor lighting.
- [Renovation Services](https://mhbuilderlahore.site/renovation.html): Kitchen remodeling, bathroom renovation, flooring, and structural repairs.
